assessment.approach: The challenge requires a two-step interaction: first, POST to /api/lattice/seed to obtain a runId and a capsule string. Second, PUT to /api/lattice/unseal using the runId in the body and the capsule as an Authorization header to complete the challenge.
evidenceUsed: $.runId mapping from seed response to unseal request
$.capsule mapping from seed response to unseal authorization header
uncertainties: The exact format of the Authorization header (e.g., Bearer vs raw string) is inferred from the evidence that the capsule is used as the authorization value.
